title: Better Armor in minecraft
description: add effects to all types off armor
body:
Full leather armor gives you speed 3


Full chainmail armor gives you speed 2 but makes iron golems angry


Full iron armor gives you speed 1 but makes iron golems angry


Full diamond armor gives you slowness 1 and regeneration 1


Full netherite armor gives you slowness 2, regeneration 1 and fire resistance and makes piglins brute friendly


In 1-3 pieces of armor normal piglins friendly


video: https://youtu.be/AFZHHRaD_-k
